fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique identifier of the price list.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the price list.

fields.name: Source Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the prices come from groups of customers, vendors or projects.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entity to which the prices are assigned. The options depend on the selection in the Assign-to Type field. If you choose an entity, the price list will be used only for that entity.

fields.name: Amount Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the price list defines prices, discounts, or both.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the price list.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date from which the price is valid.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date that the price is valid.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Gr. (Price)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default VAT business posting group code.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether line discounts are allowed. You can change this value on the lines.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether invoice discount is allowed. You can change this value on the lines.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the price list is in Draft status and can be edited, Inactive and cannot be edited or used, or Active and can be edited (when Allow Editing Active Price is enabled) and used for price calculations.

fields.name: Allow Updating Defaults
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether users can change the values in the fields on the price list lines that contain default values from the header. This does not affect the ability to allow line or invoice discounts.

fields.name: Assign-to No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entity to which the prices are assigned. The options depend on the selection in the Assign-to Type field. If you choose an entity, the price list will be used only for that entity.

fields.name: Assign-to Parent No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entity to which the prices are assigned. The options depend on the selection in the Assign-to Type field. If you choose an entity, the price list will be used only for that entity.
